  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) is not electrically bonded to the grounding electrode system."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an appropriate bonding clamp on the brass CSST fitting or rigid pipe upstream of the CSST.",
    "Run a minimum 6 AWG copper bonding wire from the clamp to the electrical service grounding electrode system."
  ],
  "rationale": "Unbonded CSST poses a severe fire and life-safety hazard because nearby lightning strikes can induce high-voltage arcs through the thin tubing wall, causing gas leaks and explosions. Both the IFGC and NFPA 54 strictly require direct bonding of CSST systems.",
  "references": [
    "IFGC Section 310.1.1",
    "NFPA 54 Section 7.13.2"
  ]
}
